name: token_inspector
description: Comprehensive token intelligence. Retrieves name, symbol, price, market cap, volume, and security metadata for any token ticker or contract address. Supports Base, Ethereum, Solana, and 10+ EVM chains. Validates asset existence and returns detailed data points.

token.description: Token ticker (e.g. $ETH, $SOL) or contract address (0x... or base58).

network.description: Blockchain network. Defaults to 'base'. Supported: base, ethereum, arbitrum, polygon, solana, etc.
